ACCIDENTAL FIRES

ARRANGEMENT OF SECTIONS
SECTION

[Original Service 2001] STATUTE LAW OF THE BAHAMAS

ACCIDENTAL FIRES [CH.74 – 3
CHAPTER 74
ACCIDENTAL FIRES
An Act to amend the law relating to accidental fires. 20 of 1961
[Commencement 31st July, 1961]
1. This Act may be cited as the Accidental Fires Act. Short title.
2. Notwithstanding any law, usage or custom to the Relief from
contrary, no action, suit, or process whatsoever shall lie, or liability for
accidental fires.
be taken, maintained or prosecuted against any person by
reason of any damage or injury resulting from any fire
which shall begin accidentally:
Provided that nothing herein contained shall affect
the civil liability of any person for any negligent or wilful
act or omission or the criminal or contractual liability of
any person.
–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
[Original Service 2001] STATUTE LAW OF THE BAHAMAS
